sigma := 
[ Sym(24) | 
(1, 17, 4, 14, 7, 2, 13, 9, 24, 22, 18, 6)(3, 23, 15, 21, 10, 16, 8, 5, 12, 20, 11, 19),
(1, 24)(2, 23)(3, 12)(4, 16)(5, 18)(6, 10)(7, 20)(8, 14)(9, 21)(11, 17)(13, 22)(15, 19),
(1, 10, 9, 22)(2, 20, 3, 15)(4, 11, 7, 8)(5, 14, 16, 6)(12, 18, 13, 23)(17, 24, 21, 19)
];
